ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drying_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drying system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the drying system (e.g., vacuum drying oven) */,
  "drying_principle" TEXT /* Principle of drying employed (e.g., vacuum, heat) */,
  "shelf_area_min" REAL /* Minimum shelf area in square meters */,
  "shelf_area_max" REAL /* Maximum shelf area in square meters */,
  "heating_method" TEXT /* Method of heating used (e.g., hot water, thermal oil) */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature that can be achieved in Celsius */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "total_hours_used" REAL /* Total operational hours of the system */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drying_systems_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vendor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the vendor's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the vendor's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for technical support */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the vendor based on service quality */,
  "partnership_since" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership with the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drying system being maintained */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "next_due" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Who performed the maintenance (e.g., vendor, in-house technician) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES drying_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drying system being evaluated */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency percentage of the drying system */,
  "output" REAL /* Output measured in units (e.g., kg, liters) */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the system */,
  "downtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Downtime in minutes during the performance measurement period */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the output (e.g., moisture content, purity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES drying_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, technician) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "system_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first drying system */,
  "system_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second drying system */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the comparison results */,
  "performance_comparison" TEXT /* Detailed comparison of performance metrics */,
  "cost_comparison" TEXT /* Detailed comparison of costs */,
  "recommended_system" TEXT /* Recommended system based on the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_comparisons_system_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("system_id_1") REFERENCES drying_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_comparisons_system_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("system_id_2") REFERENCES drying_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the system type (e.g., vacuum drying oven) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system type */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the system type in years */,
  "common_issues" TEXT /* Common issues associated with the system type */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Typical maintenance requirements for the system type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_principles" (
  "principle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drying principle */,
  "principle_name" TEXT /* Name of the principle (e.g., vacuum, heat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the principle */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Typical efficiency of the drying principle */,
  "application_areas" TEXT /* Common application areas for the principle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heating_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heating method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the heating method (e.g., hot water, electric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heating method */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of energy (e.g., electricity, gas) */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Typical efficiency of the heating method */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the heating method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
